faq3.question: How do I handle cancellations?

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.answer0: SnowMatch is a tool for ski and snowboard instructors that helps you organize your client schedule, acts as a payment medium, and allows you to connect with hundreds of students who are actively seeking an instructor. Clients can rate your services, and you can access statistics about your performance.
faqs.answer1:
SnowMatch connects you with clients who are looking for ski or snowboard lessons using location-based technology, skiing level, language, and other user-defined interests.
Once the client finds an instructor that matches their preferences, they provide their credit card information, and the match is made. From that point on, SnowMatch connects you with the student via WhatsApp chat to coordinate a meeting point on the mountain.
When the lesson ends, the payment is credited to your account.
faqs.question2: How do I create a user account?
faqs.answer2: It's very simple. You just need to fill in your personal details, upload a photo, provide your professional information (where you teach, whether you're a ski or snowboard instructor, your instructor certification), and have an email and bank account.
faqs.question3: What if I don't have a bank account?
faqs.answer3: Having a bank account where lesson payments can be deposited is essential. Currently, SnowMatch does not support cash payments or any other payment methods.
faqs.answer4: Matches occur when a client finds an instructor who meets their interests and expectations, and at the same time is available on the required date and time. Instructors cannot actively search for clients or offer their lessons; it is the client who performs the search.
faqs.question5: Do I need to confirm the lesson?
faqs.answer5: No, it's not necessary. If a match occurs, it means you indicated your availability on that day and time. If you need to cancel or reschedule a confirmed lesson, get in touch with the student through the 'My Lessons' tab. If you know any instructor who is interested in teaching that lesson, you can recommend them and earn money for it.
faqs.question6: What if I'm not available to teach?
faqs.answer6: No problem. You can set your profile as unavailable, and no one will be able to match with you.
faqs.question7: How much does it cost to be part of SnowMatch?
faqs.answer7:
All SnowMatch tools are free. A commission will only be charged for transactions made through the platform.
The commission will be 15% per lesson when the client contacted you through the tool.
The commission will be 5% if the client knows you outside of SnowMatch and only uses the platform as a payment medium.
No commission will be charged if the contact with the client and the transaction occur outside of SnowMatch, and you only use the calendar to schedule the lesson.
faqs.question8: What benefits do I have as a SnowMatch member?
faqs.answer8: Visit the PRO Deal tab in SnowMatch and discover exclusive benefits for instructors. Amazing discounts are waiting for you.

lessonTime.descriptionShort:
This instructor offers the following schedules for his classes:

lessonTime.morningTimeDescription: The teacher will be waiting for you on the day of your class at the meeting point at 9:30am. If you are late, the teacher will wait 15 minutes and then leave. No refund will be made.
lessonTime.afternoonTimeDescription: The teacher will be waiting for you on the day of your class at the meeting point at 2:30pm. If you are late, the teacher will wait 15 minutes and then leave. No refund will be made.
lessonTime.allDayTimeDescrpition: The teacher will be waiting for you on the day of your class at the meeting point at 9:30am. If you are late, the teacher will wait 15 minutes and then leave. No refund will be made. This modality includes a 1-hour lunch break. The teacher will indicate the schedule for it.

exercise.objective: El objetivo de este ejercicio es desafiar tu inclinacion al esquiar llevando tus esquies al maximo de angulacion posible. Te animas?

do.1: When rolling onto your edges, keep your shins perfectly parallel.
do.2: Think about rolling your inside ski, your outside ski will follow.

dont.1: When rolling onto your edges, keep your shins perfectly parallel.
dont.2: Think about rolling your inside ski, your outside ski will follow.

CARVING.title: Carving Challenge
CARVING.objective: The objective of this exercise is to challenge your inclination while skiing, taking your skis to the maximum possible edge angle. Are you up for it?

do.1: When tilting onto your edges, keep your shins perfectly parallel.
do.2: Think about tilting the inside ski first; the outside ski will follow.
do.3: Balance on the outside ski to maintain stability.

dont.1: Don't tilt only the outside ski; work with both edges.
dont.2: Don't neglect the inside ski; it's key for proper angulation.
dont.3: Don't lose pressure on the outside ski during the turn.

BUMPS.title: Bumps Challenge
BUMPS.objective: The objective of this exercise is to improve your control and flow on moguls (bumps), maintaining balance and a consistent line. Are you ready to surf the bumps?

do.1: Keep your knees flexible and absorb each bump with your legs.
do.2: Always look ahead, not at your skis.
do.3: Keep your torso stable and let your legs do the work.

dont.1: Don't stiffen up; avoid locking your legs.
dont.2: Don't look down; you'll lose focus if you don't look ahead.
dont.3: Don't let your arms drop; keep them active for balance.

GENERAL.title: Video Analysis
GENERAL.objective: Upload a video of yourself skiing to receive a technical analysis of your performance. Make sure to choose a clip where your full body is visible, you are moving, the lighting is good, and there are no obstacles.
GENERAL.description: Upload your video for professional analysis
GENERAL.fundamentals: Get feedback on your skiing technique from our AI and professional instructors

do.1: Ski on varied terrain that includes flat sections, steeper pitches, and (if possible) some bumps.
do.2: Focus on clean turns, maintaining dynamic balance and a smooth rhythm throughout your run.
do.3: Have someone record you from a distance where your entire body and skis are always visible (ideally in landscape mode).

dont.1: Don't ski only on easy terrain; challenge yourself with variety to show your versatility.
dont.2: Don't record too close or with shaky movements; avoid zooming too much and losing sight of your full movement.
dont.3: Don't stop mid-run unless necessary; keep flowing continuously to demonstrate control and decision-making.

heliski.subtitle1: Chart your route with IBEX HELISKI
heliski.keywords: heliski, Bariloche, ski, snowboard, tips, advice, lessons, instructors, technique, videos, SnowMatch
heliski.planningDescription: Every Heliski day starts with a detailed analysis of the weather and snow conditions in the area, carried out by our specialists.
heliski.safeAndCrewDescription: At the beginning of the activity, all participants receive a full safety briefing, including protocols and the day's plan.
heliski.premiumServiceDescription: Private lodge with food and open bar, led by a private chef. Enjoy luxury and comfort after an epic day in the mountains.

1.q: If I go with my group of friends, will we ski together all day?
1.a: Groups larger than 4 people are usually divided by skill level to ensure the best experience for everyone. If your levels are similar, you'll ski together.

2.q: When’s the best time of the season to go skiing?
2.a: Each area of the Andes peaks at different times. That’s why we adjust our operations based on the conditions. Check our availability calendar to find the best dates.

3.q: How many runs do we do per group?
3.a: Each program varies based on conditions and group pace. In our experience, we've never ended a Heliski day without our clients feeling thrilled and satisfied.

4.q: What skiing level is required for heliskiing?
4.a: We recommend at least a strong intermediate level to fully enjoy the experience. That said, heliskiing isn’t necessarily extreme or difficult. Most of our clients are families or groups of friends, and we tailor the adventure to each person’s level.

5.q: What kind of clothing should I bring?
5.a: Dress like you would for a ski resort — no need to bring a backpack. We provide each client with a Black Diamond Jetforce Airbag pack that includes avalanche safety gear. Please note: no loose clothing is allowed inside the helicopter.

6.q: What if we can’t fly during my stay?
6.a: IBEX HELISKI allows you to reschedule your Heliski day at no extra cost at any time during the 2025/2026 season. If you prefer, we offer an 80% refund.

testimonial1.quote: Snowmatch helped us digitize the entire operation. Online bookings grew 40% and online check-in eliminated queues.

testimonial3.quote: We integrated Snowmatch over our system without problems. We maintained our processes and added the digital layer.
testimonial3.name: Ana Martínez

faq1.question: How does it integrate seamlessly with my current system?
faq1.answer: Snowmatch connects via API with your existing system. We maintain your current operation and add the digital layer (online bookings, app, SEO, AI) without interrupting processes.

faq2.question: Can I process payments or connect with my point of sale?
faq2.answer: Yes, you can process payments directly with Snowmatch or connect with your current point of sale. We give you total flexibility in financial management.

faq3.question: What support do you provide during the season?
faq3.answer: 24/7 support throughout the season. We have a dedicated team that knows your operation and is available to resolve any questions or issues.

faq4.question: How do you work on SEO and funnels?
faq4.answer: We create pages optimized for search engines, implement conversion funnels and advanced tracking. The goal is for more people to find you and book.

faq5.question: Who owns the data?
faq5.answer: You own all the data. Snowmatch is your technology partner, we don't compete with your business. The data is yours and you can export it whenever you want.

faq6.question: Implementation times?
faq6.answer: Depends on the integration mode. The Snowmatch layer can be working in 2-3 weeks. Complete integration takes 4-6 weeks. We accompany you throughout the process.
